reasoning: A severe discrepancy exists between the high LLM content/structural scores (1.0) and the very low programmatic signals (shingling recall 0.347, word count ratio 0.382). The conversion fundamentally transformed a map-based infographic into a linear text list, losing the primary map graphic, compass, scale, and legend color swatches necessary for interpretation. Human judgment is required to determine if the remaining text captures the document's essential information or if the conversion is a catastrophic loss of context.

concerns.analysis: The source document is a map-based infographic where information is organized spatially. The HTML conversion fails to reproduce this layout entirely, omitting the map which is the primary focus of the document. The visual organization is shifted from a graphical presentation to a linear text list, fundamentally changing how the document is interpreted. Additionally, the NCGICC logo is excessively enlarged and misplaced at the top of the content instead of the bottom right.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: A central map showing North Carolina counties colored according to update status, with a legend and logo at the bottom.
concerns.output_quote: The HTML screenshot shows a 'Contents' sidebar and a linear list of text. The map graphic is completely missing from the body of the document.

concerns.analysis: Several meaningful images from the source PDF are missing in the HTML rendering. Most critically, the entire map of North Carolina counties is absent. Other missing meaningful elements include the compass rose (orienting the map), the scale bar (providing distance context), and the color swatches in the 'Parcel Updates' legend which are necessary to link the status categories to the (now missing) map regions.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The map of NC, the compass rose (top left), the scale bar (bottom), and the colored squares (swatches) in the legend.
concerns.output_quote: None of these visual elements are present in the HTML screenshot. The legend appears as a simple bulleted list without the color indicators.

concerns.description: Significant word count loss: 38% of baseline
